title: hieracium glomerellum
intro: Hieracium glomerellum, also known as Sticky Hawkweed, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, Hieracium glomerellum has been used for its medicinal properties, specifically for its diuretic and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The plant has been reported to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Hieracium glomerellum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
